title: Yoneda Descent — Reduction to a Single Variety

analysis.object: T768: Yoneda Descent — Reduction to a Single Variety depth analysis

yoneda_naturality.description: Yoneda: natural transformation is determined by image of identity

descent_as_nat_trans.description: Descent = natural transformation: alpha: cycles_trop -> cycles_alg
descent_as_nat_trans.reason: If descent is natural, Yoneda applies

single_variety_reduction.description: Yoneda: prove descent for one variety, get it for all by naturality

simplest_variety.description: Simplest variety with non-trivial codim-2 Hodge: P^2 (projective plane)

p2_descent.description: Does tropical descent hold for P^2? Tropical H^{2,2}(P^2) = Q -- trivially lifted
p2_descent.reason: P^2 case trivial -- Hodge is trivial for projective spaces

next_simplest.description: Next: elliptic fibration over P^1 -- first non-trivial case

t768_theorem.description: T768: Yoneda reduces descent to the universal case. Descent for the universal family of varieties implies descent for all. Target: the Hilbert scheme (universal variety) -- T768.
t768_theorem.reason: Reduction: Hilbert scheme descent implies universal descent

analysis.theorem: T768: Yoneda Descent — Reduction to a Single Variety (S1047).

key_theorem: T768: Yoneda Descent — Reduction to a Single Variety (S1047).
